# backend/routers/evals_safety.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:54Z

## Purpose
§68.10 Safety eval router — completes the §68.8/9/10 eval triplet.

3 endpoints under /api/v1/insur/evals/safety/* federated via core.insur_audit
(surface=evals_safety). RBAC catch-all /evals/* already gates this.

Composes with §48 + §57.7 + §64.21 + §64.36 + §68.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `typing` import Any
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, HTTPException, Query, Request
- from `core.insur_audit` import log_insur_access
- from `services` import safety_eval_service

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `safety_global(http_request)`: Cross-model safety scorecard, latest-per-model with verdicts.
- `safety_incidents(http_request, since, limit)`: Recent safety incidents (verdict=unsafe OR n_safety_incidents > 0).
- `safety_per_model(http_request, model_id, since, limit)`: Per-model safety history with per-row verdict_summary.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
